records.ety: [Through French, fr. L. trabs, trabis, a beam; cf. OF. tref a beam, also F. travail a frame to confine a horse, OE. trave, trevys, travise, It. travaglio, F. trave the space between two beams.]

defs: A crossbeam; a lay of joists.
A wooden frame to confine an unruly horse or ox while shoeing.
quotes: She sprung as a colt doth in the trave.
